Waiver & Release of Liability

Grand Master Baez Martial Arts

123 Main Street, Springfield, IL 62701 • (555) 123-4567 • info@gmbma.com

1. Assumption of Risk

I acknowledge that participation in martial arts training involves inherent risks, including but not limited to physical injury, property damage, or death. I voluntarily assume all such risks.

2. Release of Liability

I hereby release and discharge Grand Master Baez Martial Arts, its owners, employees, and instructors from any and all claims, demands, or causes of action arising from my participation in activities.

3. Medical Treatment

I consent to receive medical treatment deemed necessary in case of injury. I understand that I am responsible for all medical costs incurred.

4. Photo Release

I grant Grand Master Baez Martial Arts permission to use photographs and videos of me for promotional purposes without compensation.

5. Rules & Regulations

I agree to follow all school rules and policies. I understand that failure to comply may result in dismissal without refund.

Stripe Connect

Connect your Stripe account to accept payments directly through GMBMA. Process membership dues, event fees, and more.

Intuit QuickBooks

Manage accounts receivable, send invoices, and track payments with Intuit QuickBooks integration.

💳

PayPal

Accept payments via PayPal. Process one-time and recurring payments securely.

💱

Zelle

Accept payments directly via Zelle. Share your Zelle payment info with students.

🔑

Store Credentials

Securely store payment gateway API keys and credentials. Your data is encrypted at rest.

🔗

Make.com Integration

Automate workflows by connecting GMBMA to Make.com. Trigger scenarios on payments, member signups, and more.
